ab: pituay ku tuki aku tayza i cacudadan ayza a demiad.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: micudad tu, micumud tu ku saydan i cacudadan, sakamu sa ku mikeliday niyam,“ mutizeng! mibaung!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: tanutuwa han niyam musakamu,“ mahica tu saydan.”
yu picudadan sa, pasubana’ ku saydan tamiyanan tu aasipen a kamu nu Sakizaya.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Sakizaya language of numbers.

ab: kilulen niyam ku saydan miasip, mudadiw kami tu aasipen a dadiw.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: yadah tu ku katinengan aku tu kamu nu Sakizaya.
en: I have learned many Sakizaya languages.

ab: dedemiad tayza kaku i cacudadan, dedemiad minanam kaku tu kamu nu Sakizaya, a musakamu kaku patengil ci inaan.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Sakizaya language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
